title: Immunofluorescence Staining Protocol for Fetuin-A and GFAP Co-Staining
author: Miriam Heinen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.syeefte

steps.title: Place slides in hybridization oven
steps.instruction: Place slides in hybridization oven: 37°C overnight, then 1 hour at 65°C

steps.title: Deparaffination in xylene 3x20 minutes (different containers) on a shaker
steps.instruction: Deparaffination in xylene 3x20 minutes (different containers) on a shaker

steps.title: Rehydration in graded ethanol
steps.instruction: Rehydration in graded ethanol: 3x2 minutes in 100% ethanol, followed by 2x2 minutes in 96% ethanol and at last 2 minutes in 70% ethanol

steps.title: Wash in PBS for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS for 5 minutes

steps.title: Antigen retrieval in citrate buffer (10...
steps.instruction: Antigen retrieval in citrate buffer (10 mM, pH 6) in a heat steamer for 30 minutes. Afterwards let the slides cool down in PBS for 30 minutes

steps.title: Wash in PBS for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS for 5 minutes

steps.title: Encircle tissue section with wax pen
steps.instruction: Encircle tissue section with wax pen

steps.title: To block non-specific binding, apply a...
steps.instruction: To block non-specific binding, apply a solution of 10% goat serum in PBS, incubation for 1 hour in a moisture chamber

steps.title: Tip off excess solution and apply...
steps.instruction: Tip off excess solution and apply the primary antibodies MAHS-1 (dilution 1 µg/ml) and Anti-GFAP (dilution 1:50) in 1% BSA in PBS, 100 µl per section (negative controls: only 1% dilution), incubation overnight in a moisture chamber

steps.title: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water
steps.instruction: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water

steps.title: Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes

steps.title: Apply the secondary antibodies
steps.instruction: Apply the secondary antibodies: biotinylated goat-anti-mouse antibody (dilution 1:300) and polyclonal goat-anti-rabbit Alexa Fluor® 488 conjugated secondary antibody (dilution 1:300), both in 1% of BSA in PBS, 100 µl per section, incubation for 90 minutes at room temperature in a moisture chamber. keep the tissue samples from now on light protected!

steps.title: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water
steps.instruction: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water

steps.title: Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes

steps.title: Apply the Tyramide Signal Amplification Kit as follows
steps.instruction: Apply the Tyramide Signal Amplification Kit as follows: Dilute the prior prepared HRP solution 1:100 in 1% BSA in PBS, apply 100 µl per section, incubation for 1 hour at room temperature in a moisture chamber.

steps.title: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water
steps.instruction: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water

steps.title: Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes

steps.title: Prepare a tyramide working solution following...
steps.instruction: Prepare a tyramide working solution following the manufacturer’s protocol: dilute the prior prepared tyramide stock solution 1:100 in the prepared 0.0015% hydrogen peroxid solution

steps.title: Apply 100 µl per section, incubation for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Apply 100 µl per section, incubation for 10 minutes

steps.title: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water
steps.instruction: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water

steps.title: Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes

steps.title: To minimize lipofuscin autofluorescence, perform counterstaining...
steps.instruction: To minimize lipofuscin autofluorescence, perform counterstaining with Sudan Black (dilution 0.3% in 70% ethanol) for 5 minutes

steps.title: Rinse the container with demineralized water...
steps.instruction: Rinse the container with demineralized water until the solution becomes clear and colorless

steps.title: Wash in demineralized water for 3x5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in demineralized water for 3x5 minutes

steps.title: Counterstain with DAPI (dilution 0
steps.instruction: Counterstain with DAPI (dilution 0.25 µg/ml) for 5 minutes

steps.title: Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes

steps.title: Coverslip using mounting medium
steps.instruction: Coverslip using mounting medium

steps.title: store at 8°C in the dark
steps.instruction: store at 8°C in the dark

steps.title: Prepare the components of the Tyramide Signal Amplification Kit
steps.instruction: Prepare the components of the Tyramide Signal Amplification Kit
